title: ATS-Optimized Resume Bullet Rewriter by Job Description
description: Prompts that help job seekers paste any job posting and transform weak, generic resume bullets into keyword-rich, metric-driven lines that pass applicant tracking systems.
gumroad_description:
Your resume gets auto-rejected by ATS systems before a human ever sees it—even when you're qualified.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Job seekers tired of generic resume bullets that don't match job postings
— Career changers who need to translate experience into recruiter language
— Anyone applying to 50+ positions and getting radio silence

WHAT'S INSIDE

— 10 proven prompts designed specifically for ATS optimization
— Copy-paste framework: drop any job description, get keyword-rich bullets instantly
— Metric-driven templates that highlight impact (not just tasks)
— JSON + Markdown formats for easy editing and ATS compatibility
— Works with ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini

Stop guessing what keywords matter. These prompts extract the exact language hiring systems are scanning for, then rebuild your bullets to match. Your experience stays authentic. Your resume finally gets seen.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
